property.name: contextLabels
property.label: Context Lables
property.description: Comma separated texts to be shown inside the filter buttons for each context.

property.name: contextColors
property.label: Context Colors
property.description: Comma separated hex colors of the context types. This will color the filter button and the badges of each insight.

property.name: contextReferences
property.label: Context References
property.description: Comma separated API names of the context types. CASE SENSITIVE! Should match a possible value inside an insight's Context__c field.
